title: Air-Tight Case (Mearatas: The Stone Demesne)
description: Stipulations that have resulted from the history of every interaction the Djinn have had with others.

title: Dulled Hues (Plane of Smoke)
description: Shiny rocks, not unlike hundreds of others you have squirrelled away, but more!

title: Earthen Order (Mearatas: The Stone Demesne)
description: Volumes that fully describe the laws governing the interaction of the Duende.

title: Elementary Accommodation (Esianti: Palace of the Winds)
description: The Isle of Radiant Mist to the east aims to provide a comfortable hosting place for dignitaries visiting from the Plane of Water.

title: Fading Embers (Plane of Smoke)
description: The physical projection of where the elemental planes meet exacts a crushing toll on its inhabitants.

requirements.label: Piece of a Soot Steed Hoof

title: Feeling Rocks (Plane of Smoke)
description: Life granted by the plane to its individual inhabitents may be finite but air holds a long memory.

title: Fire Forever (Empyr: Realms of Ash)
description: Fragments of the everburning material projected by the Plane of Fire.

title: Fire Without Fury (Mearatas: The Stone Demesne)
description: Excruciatingly detailed documents regarding how the Efreeti are to interact with others.

Rules of the Efreeti - Volume Eight

title: Gemstones of Air (Stratos)
description: Adventurers have always had a penchant for 'borrowing' shiny things they see.

title: Guests, Gusts, Gifts (Esianti: Palace of the Winds)
description: An assortment of gifts given to and lost by ambassadors and visitors to the plane.

title: Houses of Air
description: The city of Djinn, ambassadors of Air to the other planes as well as mortals.

title: Houses of Fire
description: The Palace of Invincible Excellence sits to the east of the Harmony of the Fleeting Flames, made for the benefit of mortals of prehistoric eras.

title: Houses of Stone
description: The great stone hall holds quarters for each of the four elemental planes in addition to visiting mortals.

title: Insects of Air (Stratos)
description: Small non-native creatures that have adapted to the conditions of the plane.

title: Islands In The Sky
description: Lush green islands bridge notable locations within the greater Plane of Air.

title: Lost In Place (Empyr: Realms of Ash)
description: Those mortals that pass the Trials of Smoke do not always find themselves ready for what lies ahead.

title: Maritime Law (Mearatas: The Stone Demesne)
description: Compendiums that dictate how the Ondine are to interact with others.

requirements.label: Rules of the Ondine - Volume One
Rules of the Ondine - Volume Two
Rules of the Ondine - Volume Three
Rules of the Ondine - Volume Four
Rules of the Ondine - Volume Five

Rules of the Ondine - Volume Seven
Rules of the Ondine - Volume Eight

title: Memories of Fire (Aalishai: Palace of Embers)
description: Uninteresting miscellanea scattered throughout the charred landscape.

title: Natural Wonder (Esianti: Palace of the Winds)
description: The mild climate of Esianti allows for the many plants brought as gifts from visiting dignitaries to flourish on the small island.

title: No Stone Unturned (Aalishai: Palace of Embers)
description: You never seem to tire of your habbit of picking up everything you possibly can from wherever you go.

requirements.label: Piece of an Earth Elemental Fossil

title: Palace Aides (Esianti: Palace of the Winds)
description: Holy relics and body parts harvested from the creatures that inhabit the palace.

title: Puzzling Plantlife (Empyr: Realms of Ash)
description: The flora of Empyr appears to have more in common with deep sea life than with traditional plants.

title: Pyre Place
description: Ornate minarets surround the palace that sits at the center of this charred section of the Plane of Fire.

title: Relics of Fire
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: Relics of Wind
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: Remnants of Air (Stratos)
description: All that remains of these beings after the fleeting gift of life has been taken back by the elemental plane.

title: Seeds of Air (Stratos)
description: A sampling of flora native to this part of the greater Plane of Air.

title: Small Documents (Gnome Memorial Mountain)
description: Documents pertaining to the history and future of the mountain.

requirements.label: Pamphlet: How We Honor the Past

title: Small Feuds (Gnome Memorial Mountain)
description: Accoutrements of the Bloodmoon tribe that dwell outside the mausoleum.

title: Small Hills
description: A recently uncovered monument to gnomish creations.

title: Small Memories (Gnome Memorial Mountain)
description: Artifacts of the Makers, honored and preserved in their memory.

title: Small Parts (Gnome Memorial Mountain)
description: Components once intended for a grand tinkering project.

title: The Life of Fire (Empyr: Realms of Ash)
description: Physical manifestations of lives granted by the plane taken by adventurers.

requirements.label: Piece of a Fire Snail Shell

title: The Ruby Tear (Aalishai: Palace of Embers)
description: A gemstone of particular renown broken into eight pieces. Mostly of note because it's shiny!

title: Those Who Extinguish (Aalishai: Palace of Embers)
description: Adventurers have proven capable of destroying life just as fast as any elemental plane is able to manifest it.

title: Trials By Fire
description: Desolate islands bridge the influence between Air and Fire.

title: Tried and Failed (Plane of Smoke)
description: Accoutrements of those adventurers who thought themselves ready for the Trials of Smoke.
